mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_user WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND user_pw = #{userPw}
SELECT user_no, user_nickname, user_email, user_phone_num, user_pw, user_type, user_status FROM tbl_user WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT u.user_email, o.organ_name, o.organ_cert_num FROM tbl_user u JOIN tbl_organ o ON u.organ_no = o.organ_no WHERE u.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT N.user_nickname AS userNickname, COUNT(A.VOLUN_ACT_NO) AS volunActNo, NVL(SUM(V.VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME - V.VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME), 0) AS totalVolunTime, (SELECT NVL(MAX(RANK_POINT), 0) FROM TBL_RANKING R WHERE R.USER_NO = N.USER_NO) AS rankPoint, (select nvl(kkomi_lev,1) from tbl_kkomi k where n.user_no =k.user_no) as kkomiLev, (SELECT NVL(SUM(TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) FROM TBL_CURRENCY C WHERE C.USER_NO = N.USER_NO) AS totalAmount FROM TBL_USER N LEFT JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A ON N.USER_NO = A.USER_NO LEFT JOIN TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY V ON A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = V.VOLUN_ACT_NO WHERE N.USER_NO = #{userNo} GROUP BY N.user_nickname, N.USER_NO
SELECT LOG_REASON, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logDate, CHANGE_amount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tva.volun_act_title AS volunActTitle, TO_CHAR(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS comVolunActProcBegin, TO_CHAR(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS comVolunActProcEnd FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Volun_Act_Title AS volunActTitle, TO_CHAR(Volun_Act_Date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS finVolunActProcEnd FROM TBL_VOLUN_HISTORY WHERE User_No = #{userNo} ORDER BY Volun_Act_Date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY tva.volun_act_no DESC) AS rnum, tva.volun_act_no AS volunActNo, tva.volun_act_title AS volunActTitle, TO_CHAR(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS comVolunActProcBegin, TO_CHAR(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS comVolunActProcEnd FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 AND tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY comVolunActProcEnd ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 AND tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 2

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC) AS rnum, log_reason AS logReason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logDate, change_amount AS changeAmount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0 ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC) AS rnum, log_reason AS logReason, TO_CHAR(LOG_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logDate, change_amount AS changeAmount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0 ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY tcp.post_no DESC) AS rnum, tcp.post_No AS postNo, tcp.post_title AS postTitle, TO_CHAR(tcp.post_Date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS postDate, tpl.post_Like_No AS postLikeNo FROM tbl_community_post tcp LEFT JOIN tbl_post_like tpl ON tcp.post_no = tpl.post_no WHERE tcp.user_no = #{userNo} ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
